channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: UK House of Lords committee calls on Bank of England to reconsider proposed stablecoin restrictions
item.description: The Bank of England proposed limits of 20,000 pounds per coin for individuals and 10 million pounds for businesses.

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Iranian Crypto Exchanges Including Nobitex for Terrorist Financing
item.description: The Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control accused the platforms of enabling illicit finance activities across Iran's crypto ecosystem.

item.title: US lawmakers push back on Labor Department plans to include crypto in 401(k)s
item.description: The three members of Congress said the volatility of digital assets and “lack of regulation and safeguards” could put Americans’ retirement savings at risk.

item.title: As Bitcoin Sinks, It's Time for Ethereum to Outperform: Standard Chartered
item.description: Bitcoin is falling following Strategy's first BTC sale since 2022—and one analyst sees that as a good thing for Ethereum.

item.title: SEC makes digital assets strategic priority through 2030
item.description: The regulator’s five-year roadmap calls for clearer crypto rules, support for tokenization and a framework for staking and onchain markets.

item.title: U.S. sanctions Iranian crypto exchanges in ongoing war against the country
item.description: OFAC said it was blacklisting Nobitex and three other Iranian exchanges, as well as a few executives, citing links to terror and other crimes.

item.title: Crypto correction vaporized $176B in investor funds: Are bears back in control?
item.description: Bitcoin and altcoin prices crumbled as BTC lost the $70,000 level. Will investors’ pivot to AI stocks continue to weigh on crypto markets?

item.title: Microsoft Says Latest AI Models Beat Claude, Google's Nano Banana
item.description: Microsoft unveiled seven in-house AI models and claimed its flagship reasoning and image systems outperform rivals from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google.

item.title: Crypto PACs pour $3M into Maryland races as California voters head to polls
item.description: An affiliate of a political action committee backed by crypto companies ramped up spending on ads in California ahead of Tuesday’s primaries, but still has millions of dollars at stake in Maryland later this month.

item.title: Strategy Shares Fall for Second Straight Day After $56 Billion Bitcoin Giant Sells BTC
item.description: Shares in the leading Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy (MSTR) are now more than 70% off their 52-week high after the company sold BTC.

item.title: Microsoft Turns OpenClaw Into an Enterprise AI Agent With Scout
item.description: Tech people will say everyone's already using OpenClaw. They're right. But Microsoft is the one with 1.4 billion Windows users ready to adopt it.

item.title: Coinbase backs Ethena ahead of savings product launch for exchange's 100 million users
item.description: Coinbase Ventures, the exchange's venture arm, bought Ethena tokens on the open market as the protocol is set to roll out a Coinbase integration next week.

item.title: Coinbase invests in ProShares ETF tailored for stablecoin reserve assets
item.description: The exchange has invested an undisclosed amount in ProShares’ Treasury-focused ETF built for the post-GENIUS era as lawmakers debate whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-bearing products.

item.title: Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren Urge Labor Department to Drop Bitcoin, Crypto 401K Plan
item.description: The senators said a plan allowing fiduciaries to offer exposure to riskier assets like crypto and private equity would hurt retirees and personally benefit President Trump.

item.title: Bitcoin’s $224K ‘fair value’ may emerge if sovereign debt fears deepen: Bitwise
item.description: A sovereign default-risk model estimates Bitcoin’s fair value at $224,000, as rising debt risks and bond-market stress could strengthen the asset’s long-term investment case.

item.title: Galaxy enters institutional prediction markets with $10 million Arca trade
item.description: The digital asset firm launched OTC prediction markets trading for institutions and completed a $10 million trade tied to U.S. crypto legislation with hedge fund Arca.

item.title: Where Does Bitcoin Go From Here? This Is What the Charts Say
item.description: Bitcoin just had its worst day since April. The death cross is in effect, and prediction markets are bearish.

item.title: New York’s Crypto Watchdog Teams With EU to Police Stablecoins
item.description: The New York Department of Financial Services and European Banking Authority said they'll work together to oversee stablecoins.

item.title: Tom Lee predicts ether will hit $250,000 as corporate validators take over network control
item.description: The Bitmine chairman said DeFi and AI could push the Ethereum network's value into the multi-trillion range, making current prices “future optionality at a discount”.

item.title: Bitcoin set for 'choppy summer' as capital chases high-flying AI stocks, K33 says
item.description: The firm still views bitcoin as undervalued relative to equities, but says investors are rotating into AI stocks as the opportunity cost of missing gains by holding BTC is too high.

item.title: As Strategy Sells Bitcoin, Strive Doubles Down With $4.2 Billion Offering
item.description: Benchmark-StoneX analysts grew bullish towards Strive after the Bitcoin-buying asset manager padded cash reserves while growing its stockpile.

item.title: President Trump Signs AI Executive Order After Delaying It Over China Concerns
item.description: Trump's executive order creates a voluntary framework for reviewing advanced AI models, expands AI-powered cybersecurity efforts, and more.

item.title: Bitcoin gets new $50K target after BTC price crashes 6% in a day
item.description: Bitcoin price bets saw $50,000 returning after 6% daily BTC price losses liquidated $1.25 billion of crypto positions.

item.title: CFTC chair claims Gemini case was politically motivated, seeks to reverse settlement
item.description: The CFTC chair seeks to roll back an enforcement action on the company founded by Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss, donors to Donald Trump’s 2024 campaign and attendees at White House events.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act added to Senate Legislative Calendar, making it eligible for full Senate consideration. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9LdGkxOUVWSEhiaEdsdnhwYnROTjA0RTFGRE04TkVQU2hSdGxtNFY2T1NXTnpQenVDWWJsTjZ4dVpjaGVMM2c2WUp0RGlRV3lqMWllYVo2bEV0RHRVMnBkMFVn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act a…

item.title: Movement expands stablecoin payments push with access to US, Canada, EU rails
item.description: The Move-based blockchain network said it gained access to licensed payment infrastructure as it shifts toward stablecoin settlement and remittances.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner Hive Reports Revenue Surge as It Bets on Powering AI Boom
item.description: Hive mined nearly 2,900 Bitcoin last year and is now racing to build what it calls Canada's largest private AI data center.

item.title: Will Strategy's Peers Dump Bitcoin Now? Not So Fast, Analysts Say
item.description: Crypto analysts say investors should look closely at each company's financial situation rather than expecting a cascade of incoming sales.

item.title: BREAKING 🚨: Bitcoin bitcoin:native Timberrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr 📉📉 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9IWVRlb2VYR3pLMms2S1cxLXpvbExYd3gteV84ZHJKYTRkSC1LOW8yeGdhYWlFZFV1TU54a3F3M0tvTFZwYVJVdnYyTDdSV0RoX2FNRi1ZT2JZWktZSUE?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING 🚨: Bitcoin bitcoin:native Tim…

item.title: Bitcoin faces an 'identity crisis' and DeFi devs need to stop acting like tech bros
item.description: Solstice Labs CEO Ben Nadareski says developers must act like financial managers to win back institutional trust amid ongoing security exploits.

item.title: Hyperliquid predicted 80% of oil move before traditional exchanges opened, says expert report
item.description: TD Securities says "perpetual futures" are exploding beyond crypto as platforms like Hyperliquid outpace traditional Wall Street exchanges on everything from pre-IPO tech stocks to weekend oil trading.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $67,000 $700,000,000 liquidated from the crypto market in the past 2 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBMMU1kUjdXMXRuODFJWURqOXluSjRrdGhUd2tqdUZma0pDcW9pelY1b1BjdWViY0tBM1JXYkpVQlBVWklKYlhoWVdFdzdKbnRIYURESFpQVUVPMExWUDFCRmpn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $67…

item.title: Here's how one decentralized cloud provider says private citizens can make money from AI
item.description: Titan Network says its crowdsourced computing network has signed tech giants like Tencent and Alibaba as clients, saving them as much 75% on AI costs.

item.title: Bitcoin Traders Flip Bearish as BTC Falls to Lowest Price in Months
item.description: Myriad predictors think it's increasingly likely that Bitcoin's next stop is $55,000 rather than $84,000 as BTC continues its slide.

item.title: Anthropic Expands Access to Claude Mythos After AI Giant Files for IPO
item.description: Just a day after the nearly $1 trillion AI giant revealed IPO plans, Anthropic is letting more firms access its powerful Claude Mythos model.

item.title: Zama accelerates compliance after court lifts $12.5M USDC freeze
item.description: Privacy protocol Zama says it will accelerate compliance measures after a court lifted a $12.5 million USDC freeze tied to an unrelated legal dispute.

item.title: Gary Vaynerchuk says AI is creating the biggest opportunity ever for entrepreneurs
item.description: AI is reshaping business faster than most leaders realize, and Gary Vaynerchuk argues the biggest winners will be creative builders willing to adapt.

item.title: NEW: Andrew Yang's Noble Mobile has acquired crypto-powered wireless carrier Helium Mobile, combining Noble's mobile service business with Helium's blockchain-based wireless network. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFA5UVF4amlpV1R2Y0RidHk5ak51MDM1ZVc2OHhiUzJIX1NWeG8waFFud2I4Yzg2ZlJoMG1ZTjhOUHU0TnBFRE9FdUhCNFdMV09iRFpPNktGVUxhcEVoeWc?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Andrew Yang's Noble Mobile has acq…

item.title: Hyperliquid is beating ethereum in trading volume on some days as big money rotates, says FalconX
item.description: Institutional investors are ditching range-bound bitcoin and ether for Hyperliquid as the decentralized platform wins over hedge funds with massive liquidity and early access to hot markets, according to Joshua Lim, head of markets at Falc…

item.title: Georgia targets illegal crypto mining in Mestia crackdown: Report
item.description: Georgia will reportedly install electricity meters across Mestia to curb illegal crypto mining after officials blamed miners for grid strain and outages.

item.title: I said yest in an intv that IMO bitcoin has become too dependent on ETFs/MSTR narrative, esp when it has the "Nothing Stops This Train" narrative, which gets more powerful every year (just look at Knicks Finals tix in '99 vs today). ETFs/MSTR should be seen a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5yaXlTTjlxNC1LRUlVNG9vOGhKbmVYOHZnSUpWWm5JVHMwcmFDUk9SZ090eEtaajRYanlCU2NMQjVfbXdyV1Y2LUhJQVB5ZkVuS0l2XzREQUZlSzdrdkpKcEdXY1M?oc=5" target="_blank">I said yest in an intv that IMO…

item.title: Solana Now Has Native Subscriptions & Allowances
item.description: Recurring payments and delegated spending are now available as a shared onchain primitive, and teams are already building on it.

item.title: Kaiko acquires Amberdata in blockchain data consolidation push
item.description: Kaiko acquired Amberdata to expand its institutional crypto data platform with derivatives analytics, onchain tools and AI-powered research.

item.title: BITCOIN SLIDES BELOW $70K AS BEARISH BETS BUILD Bitcoin fell under $70,000 to $68,913 (-3.4%) amid $483.8M ETF outflows, two weeks of zero inflows, and $431M in long liquidations. Reports of Strategy selling BTC added pressure. Prediction mark - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5qTXRXWTc1Z3FYRnVTeVpzSEpCdy1sbk1xQm9uRjkwVzQxakw5NEt6cWZrb09BSFNrQy1PWlQ5MklGQUlPazZkYWJ3cFZ3TkExTTJoNDl3dGdUY1U4M3c?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN SLIDES BELOW $70K AS BEARISH BE…

item.title: JUST IN: $320,000,000 worth of crypto longs liquidated in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBLaW8zU1lSMGF3LUdMem94T0J0b1Y2STd4UmNjZ3dNalprSy1RLVZVc25LWG1Xa2szVkRDMFVRN2tKdmlLU05GMGUzNXRvY2FmM1YybzM1VTVSNFhBOFE1QzBB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $320,000,000 worth of cry…

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $68,000, now down -$6,500 over the last 40 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1DcE8tN25Lb1J1VXVVYkdyZm5wMGR0c19HYlA2R1hRN0ZSTXNzdnVGVTkta3JVUVNWdlRLYndUR1psSTk4cU9MMXZHWWJWSXNvXzNKZ1ltbTFNS0hwQjBlOVJrMnZRdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Andrew Yang's Noble Acquires Crypto-Fueled Helium Mobile Service
item.description: Crypto-powered cell service Helium Mobile has been acquired by Andrew Yang's Noble, which will also utilize the underlying Helium network.

item.title: HIVE Bitcoin holdings drop by 331 BTC in Q1, reports record $298M revenue
item.description: HIVE reduced its Bitcoin holdings to 150 BTC while annual revenue climbed to $297.8 million, driven by growth in mining and AI computing.

item.title: How to better understand bitcoin’s perpetual identity crisis
item.description: Here, Bailey unpacks the uncertainty surrounding the original cryptocurrency’s nature, which creates inconsistent market behavior.

item.title: How high can NEAR price go in June?
item.description: NEAR has rebounded from a key historical support zone, reviving a bullish fractal that preceded 2,375% and 900% rallies in previous cycles.

item.title: Trader says XRP price setting ‘biggest bear trap’ after June monthly open
item.description: XRP trades below key macro support, but analysts say reclaiming it could trigger one of the biggest bear traps.

item.title: A new era of crypto is on the horizon. 7.1.26. robinhood.com/presents - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE85RlhQZE1GM0F5eFVWdWRCZG1XeVZDQmkxcFk1aXdoMHNSazJTVWZFQ2pvYWdXeDZNenVzUVcyTFJPNTVIRVNnOGFGeUpjQ1A2Vl9tOWRkQ09UemNNY2VqdTZoSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">A new era of crypto is on the ho…

item.title: Franklin Templeton teams up with MoonPay to let big investors swap stablecoins for yields 24/7
item.description: The Wall Street giant is integrating its tech platform with MoonPay's infrastructure, allowing eligible institutions to seamlessly swap stablecoins for yield-generating tokenized funds without ever leaving the blockchain.

item.title: MoneyGram launches MGUSD stablecoin on Stellar network
item.description: MoneyGram launched MGUSD, a dollar stablecoin on Stellar, as the remittance company deepens its push into blockchain-based global payments.

item.title: Mt. Gox Moves $739M in Bitcoin as Repayment Deadline Looms
item.description: The defunct exchange still has about 35,000 BTC left to distribute, though the latest transfer does not show a sale.

item.title: Strategy's bitcoin sale may mark start of ether outperformance, StanChart's Kendrick says
item.description: ETH could outperform BTC by 40% from current levels as bitcoin treasuries may sell assets to cover obligations, the bank's digital asset research head said.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) falls 8.4%, leading index lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE), down 3.9% from Monday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: Movement pivots to stablecoin payments as the layer-2 boom loses momentum
item.description: The team behind Movement said it plans to leverage licensed payment partners alongside blockchain settlement rails to target the roughly $685 billion remittance market serving low and middle-income countries.

item.title: EdgeX blames ‘external party’ for token crash as ZachXBT alleges insider manipulation
item.description: Onchain investigator ZachXBT claims decentralized exchange edgeX insiders controlled nearly the entire supply with a thin float.
